title: ophrys crabronifera subsp. biscutella
intro: Ophrys crabronifera subsp. biscutella, also known as the Bee Orchid or Biscutella Bee Orchid, is a rare and endemic subspecies of the Ophrys crabronifera species, characterized by its unique and distinctive appearance. Traditionally, the Biscutella Bee Orchid has been used in herbal medicine, valued for its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal benefits. The plant is said to possess health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the Biscutella Bee Orchid is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, typically in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
